encrypt-pdf-disable-printing.title: Encrypt PDF with Password and Disable Printing
encrypt-pdf-disable-printing.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, apply password protection with AES‑256 encryption, and restrict printing by setting specific permissions.

encrypt-pdf-owner-password-permissions.title: Encrypt PDF with Owner Password and Permissions
encrypt-pdf-owner-password-permissions.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using an owner password, enable high‑resolution printing, and restrict copying by setting permissions with Aspose.Pdf.

decrypt-pdf-using-owner-password.title: Decrypt PDF Using Owner Password
decrypt-pdf-using-owner-password.description: Demonstrates opening an encrypted PDF with the owner password, removing its protection, and saving the resulting decrypted file.

restrict-pdf-permissions-disable-extract.title: Restrict PDF Permissions: Disable Extraction and Form Filling
restrict-pdf-permissions-disable-extract.description: The example loads a signed PDF, defines allowed permissions that exclude content extraction and form filling, applies AES‑256 encryption with those permissions, and saves the updated document.

add-visible-digital-signature-second-pag.title: Add Visible Digital Signature to Second Page
add-visible-digital-signature-second-pag.description: Loads a PDF, creates a visible signature field in the bottom‑right corner of the second page, and signs it with a PFX certificate.

add-invisible-digital-signature-to-pdf.title: Add Invisible Digital Signature to PDF
add-invisible-digital-signature-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to apply an invisible PKCS#7 digital signature to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, preserving the original layout with an incremental update.

extract-signature-field-metadata.title: Extract Signature Field Metadata from PDF
extract-signature-field-metadata.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through its form fields, identifies signature fields, and outputs their properties and embedded signature details.

extract-embedded-images-from-pdf.title: Extract Embedded Images from PDF Pages
extract-embedded-images-from-pdf.description: Loads a signed PDF, iterates through each page, extracts all embedded XImage objects, and saves them as PNG files in an output folder.

remove-digital-signature-from-pdf.title: Remove Digital Signature from PDF
remove-digital-signature-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, enable signature sanitization, and save the document to strip any digital signatures when the PDF privileges allow it.

sign-pdf-with-smart-card.title: Sign PDF with Smart Card and PIN Prompt
sign-pdf-with-smart-card.description: Demonstrates how to add a signature field to a PDF and sign it using a certificate stored on a smart card, triggering the OS PIN dialog automatically.

sign-pdf-with-smart-card-no-pin.title: Sign PDF with Smart Card without PIN Prompt
sign-pdf-with-smart-card-no-pin.description: Demonstrates how to sign a PDF using a smart‑card certificate via Aspose.Pdf, providing a custom hash delegate to avoid any PIN UI prompts.

apply-custom-security-handler-disable-co.title: Apply Custom Security Handler to Disable Copy‑Paste in PDF
apply-custom-security-handler-disable-co.description: The example demonstrates implementing a custom ICustomSecurityHandler that disables the ExtractContent permission (copy‑paste) and applying it to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's Encrypt method.

sign-pdf-with-timestamp.title: Sign PDF with Trusted Timestamp Authority
sign-pdf-with-timestamp.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature to a PDF and attach a timestamp from a TSA server using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-pdf-signature-certificate-chain.title: Validate PDF Signature and Certificate Chain
validate-pdf-signature-certificate-chain.description: Loads a PDF, finds signature fields, and verifies a detached PKCS#7 signature while checking the certificate chain using Aspose.Pdf validation options.

validate-pdf-signature-ocsp.title: Validate PDF Signature Using OCSP
validate-pdf-signature-ocsp.description: Shows how to load a signed PDF, locate signature fields, configure OCSP validation options, and verify the digital signature with Aspose.Pdf.

validate-pdf-signature-crl.title: Validate PDF Signature Using CRL Revocation Check
validate-pdf-signature-crl.description: Shows how to verify a digital signature in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf by using CRL distribution points to confirm the certificate's revocation status.

extract-signing-time-utc.title: Extract Signing Time from PDF Signature and Convert to UTC
extract-signing-time-utc.description: Shows how to load a signed PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate signature fields, read the signing date, and convert it to UTC format.

extract-certificate-chain-from-pdf-signa.title: Extract Certificate Chain from PDF Signature and Save as DER Files
extract-certificate-chain-from-pdf-signa.description: Shows how to load a signed PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate signature fields, extract the leaf certificate, build its X509 chain, and write each certificate in the chain to separate DER files.

sign-pdf-with-reason-contact-location.title: Sign PDF with Reason, Contact, and Location
sign-pdf-with-reason-contact-location.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature field to a PDF and sign it using a PKCS#7 certificate while setting the Reason, ContactInfo, and Location properties.

certify-pdf-no-changes.title: Certify PDF with No-Changes Permission
certify-pdf-no-changes.description: Shows how to apply a certification (DocMDP) signature to a PDF that prevents any further modifications using Aspose.Pdf.

sign-pdf-with-digital-signature.title: Sign PDF with Digital Signature using Aspose.Pdf
sign-pdf-with-digital-signature.description: Shows how to load a PDF, add a signature field, sign it with a PFX certificate, and save the signed document using Aspose.Pdf.

sign-pdf-lock-specific-form-fields.title: Sign PDF and Lock Specific Form Fields
sign-pdf-lock-specific-form-fields.description: Demonstrates how to sign a PDF using a PKCS#7 certificate and then set selected form fields to read‑only to prevent further editing.

sign-pdf-with-visible-signature-and-lock.title: Digitally Sign PDF with Visible Signature and Lock Document
sign-pdf-with-visible-signature-and-lock.description: Loads a PDF, creates a PKCS#1 digital signature, adds a visible signature field on the first page, signs the document, and saves it as a read‑only PDF.

encrypt-pdf-aes256.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Set Passwords
encrypt-pdf-aes256.description: Shows how to load a PDF, apply AES‑256 encryption with user and owner passwords, define permissions, and save the encrypted document using Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdf-rc4-128-bit.title: Encrypt PDF with RC4 128‑bit and Restrict Editing
encrypt-pdf-rc4-128-bit.description: Shows how to load a PDF, apply RC4 128‑bit encryption with user and owner passwords, limit permissions to printing only, and save the encrypted file.

decrypt-pdf-extract-images.title: Decrypt PDF and Extract Images
decrypt-pdf-extract-images.description: Demonstrates decrypting a password‑protected PDF and extracting all embedded images to separate files.

decrypt-pdf-update-metadata.title: Decrypt PDF with Owner Password and Update Metadata
decrypt-pdf-update-metadata.description: Demonstrates opening an encrypted PDF using the owner password, decrypting it, modifying document metadata (title, author, subject, keywords), and saving the updated file.

batch-encrypt-pdfs-by-filename.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with Passwords Derived from File Names
batch-encrypt-pdfs-by-filename.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt all PDF files in a folder using Aspose.Pdf, generating a password from each file name and saving the encrypted copies to an output directory.

batch-decrypt-pdf-lookup.title: Batch Decrypt Password-Protected PDFs Using a Lookup Table
batch-decrypt-pdf-lookup.description: Demonstrates how to decrypt multiple encrypted PDF files in a folder by retrieving each file's password from a dictionary and saving the decrypted PDFs to an output directory.

batch-sign-pdfs-metadata-certificate.title: Batch Sign PDFs with Metadata‑Based Certificate Selection
batch-sign-pdfs-metadata-certificate.description: Demonstrates how to process a folder of PDF files, choose a signing certificate based on the document's title or author metadata, and apply a PKCS#7 signature to all signature fields using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-encrypt-sign-pdf.title: Batch Encrypt and Digitally Sign PDFs
batch-encrypt-sign-pdf.description: Creates sample PDFs, encrypts each file, then adds a digital signature using a self‑signed certificate.

extract-signature-field-names-and-page-n.title: Extract Signature Field Names and Page Numbers from PDF
extract-signature-field-names-and-page-n.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate over its form fields, detect signature fields, and output each field's name along with the page number it appears on.

list-signature-dictionaries-object-ids.title: List Signature Dictionaries and Their Object IDs
list-signature-dictionaries-object-ids.description: Shows how to enumerate signature fields in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access the underlying COS dictionary via reflection, and output each field's object ID.

retrieve-signature-reason-location.title: Retrieve Signature Reason and Location from PDF
retrieve-signature-reason-location.description: Loads a signed PDF, iterates through its form fields, and extracts the Reason and Location metadata from each digital signature field.

compute-pdf-hash-before-after-signing.title: Compute PDF Hash Before and After Signing
compute-pdf-hash-before-after-signing.description: Demonstrates how to compute a hash of a PDF document, apply a digital signature, and compare hashes to verify integrity.

encrypted-pdf-with-attachment-and-signat.title: Create Encrypted PDF with Attachment and Digital Signature
encrypted-pdf-with-attachment-and-signat.description: Demonstrates how to embed a file into a PDF, encrypt the document for a specific recipient using AES‑256, and then apply a PKCS#7 detached digital signature.

sign-pdf-embed-xmp-metadata.title: Sign PDF and Embed Custom XMP Metadata
sign-pdf-embed-xmp-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature field, apply a PKCS#7 signature, and embed custom XMP metadata describing the signing details in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

sign-pdf-embed-custom-xml.title: Sign PDF and Embed Custom XML Signature Data
sign-pdf-embed-custom-xml.description: Demonstrates how to add a signature field to a PDF, create a PKCS#7 signature with a certificate, embed custom XML data via a custom hash delegate, and save the signed document using Aspose.Pdf.

sign-pdf-and-lock-signature-field.title: Sign PDF and Lock Signature Field
sign-pdf-and-lock-signature-field.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature field to a PDF, sign it with a PFX certificate, and lock the field to prevent further modifications using Aspose.Pdf.

sign-pdf-allow-additional-signatures.title: Sign PDF and Enable Additional Signatures
sign-pdf-allow-additional-signatures.description: Demonstrates how to sign a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, configure the document for incremental updates, and create a signature field that can be signed again later by other users.

sign-pdf-append-only-finality.title: Sign PDF and Enforce Append‑Only Finality
sign-pdf-append-only-finality.description: Shows how to digitally sign a PDF with a PFX certificate using Aspose.Pdf, set the document to append‑only mode, and prevent any further signatures or modifications.

encrypt-pdf-print-only-permission.title: Encrypt PDF with Print‑Only Permission
encrypt-pdf-print-only-permission.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, encrypt it with AES‑256, and restrict permissions so that only printing is allowed.

encrypt-pdf-allow-copy-block-print.title: Encrypt PDF and Allow Copying While Blocking Printing
encrypt-pdf-allow-copy-block-print.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using AES‑256, permit content extraction (copy) and disable printing, then save the protected document.

encrypt-pdf-with-print-copy-permissions.title: Encrypt PDF with Printing and Copying Permissions
encrypt-pdf-with-print-copy-permissions.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, set user and owner passwords, allow printing and content extraction, and save the protected document.

encrypt-pdf-disable-content-extraction.title: Encrypt PDF and Disable Content Extraction
encrypt-pdf-disable-content-extraction.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, applying AES‑256 encryption, setting permissions to allow only printing while disabling content extraction, and saving the encrypted document.

decrypt-extract-reencrypt.title: Decrypt PDF, Extract Images, and Re‑Encrypt with New Owner Password
decrypt-extract-reencrypt.description: Demonstrates decrypting an encrypted PDF, extracting embedded images, and re‑encrypting the document with a new owner password.

encrypt-pdf-with-user-password.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password using Aspose.Pdf
encrypt-pdf-with-user-password.description: Loads a PDF from a byte array, applies AES‑256 encryption with a user password and specific permissions, and returns the encrypted PDF as a byte array.

sign-pdf-with-windows-certificate.title: Sign PDF Using a Windows Certificate Store Certificate
sign-pdf-with-windows-certificate.description: Demonstrates loading a certificate from the Windows certificate store by thumbprint and using Aspose.Pdf to add a signature field and apply a digital signature to a PDF document.

sign-pdf-hardware-token.title: Sign PDF with Hardware Token (PKCS#11) using Aspose.Pdf
sign-pdf-hardware-token.description: Shows how to sign a PDF document with a certificate stored on a hardware token or smart card by using Aspose.Pdf's external signature support.

validate-pdf-digital-signature.title: Validate PDF Digital Signature
validate-pdf-digital-signature.description: Loads a PDF, locates signature fields, verifies each signature with strict validation options, and outputs detailed validation results and error messages.

validate-pdf-signature-timestamp.title: Validate PDF Signature and Verify Timestamp Within Certificate Validity
validate-pdf-signature-timestamp.description: Demonstrates how to load a signed PDF, verify each digital signature using strict validation, extract the signing certificate, and ensure the signing timestamp falls inside the certificate's validity period.

extract-signature-image-to-png.title: Extract Signature Appearance Image to PNG
extract-signature-image-to-png.description: Loads a PDF, locates the first signature field, extracts its appearance as a PNG image, and saves it to disk.

extract-signature-images.title: Extract Signature Images from PDF
extract-signature-images.description: Shows how to load a signed PDF, iterate through its signature fields, and extract each field's appearance image as a JPEG file.

extract-images-from-signed-pdf.title: Extract Images from Signed PDF into Page Folders
extract-images-from-signed-pdf.description: Shows how to load a signed PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page, extract embedded images, and save them into separate page‑specific folders.

extract-signature-certificate-chain.title: Extract Signature Certificate Chain and Verify Expiration
extract-signature-certificate-chain.description: Loads a signed PDF, extracts each signature's X509 certificate, builds its certificate chain, and reports the expiration status of every chain element and the leaf certificate.

custom-security-watermark.title: Create PDF with Custom Security Handler and Watermark
custom-security-watermark.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, adding a watermark to each page using WatermarkArtifact, and encrypting the document with a custom security handler.

custom-security-handler-disable-copy-pas.title: Apply Custom Security Handler to Disable Copy‑Paste and Add Warning Overlay
custom-security-handler-disable-copy-pas.description: Demonstrates implementing a simple ICustomSecurityHandler to encrypt a PDF, restrict permissions to disable copy‑paste, and add a visible warning text overlay on each page.

sign-pdf-and-flatten-signature.title: Sign PDF and Flatten Signature Appearance
sign-pdf-and-flatten-signature.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature to a PDF using a PFX certificate, then flatten the document so the signature appearance becomes a static, non‑editable part.

sign-pdf-remove-annotations-preserve-sig.title: Sign PDF and Remove All Annotations While Preserving the Signature
sign-pdf-remove-annotations-preserve-sig.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, disable automatic sanitization, and then delete every annotation except the signature field before saving the document.

encrypt-pdf-with-passwords.title: Encrypt PDF with User and Owner Passwords
encrypt-pdf-with-passwords.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, set specific permissions, encrypt it with user and owner passwords, and save the protected document using Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdf-owner-password-editing.title: Encrypt PDF with Owner Password for Editing Only
encrypt-pdf-owner-password-editing.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf so it can be opened without a password for viewing, while requiring an owner password for any modifications. Permissions are set to allow printing and content extraction only.

decrypt-pdf-and-resign-multiple-certific.title: Decrypt Encrypted PDF and Re‑sign Signature Fields with Multiple Certificates
decrypt-pdf-and-resign-multiple-certific.description: The example demonstrates opening an encrypted PDF with a password, removing its encryption, locating all signature fields, and re‑signing each field using a different PKCS#7 certificate before saving the updated document.

batch-encrypt-pdfs-archive-zip.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs and Archive to ZIP
batch-encrypt-pdfs-archive-zip.description: Shows how to encrypt multiple PDF files with unique passwords using Aspose.Pdf and store the encrypted PDFs in a ZIP archive.

extract-digest-algorithm-from-pdf-signat.title: Extract Digest Algorithm from PDF Digital Signatures
extract-digest-algorithm-from-pdf-signat.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over its signature fields, retrieves the signature algorithm information, and logs the digest hash algorithm for compliance reporting.

sign-pdf-with-sha384.title: Sign PDF with SHA‑384 Digest using Aspose.Pdf
sign-pdf-with-sha384.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF and a PFX certificate, adding a signature field, and signing the document with the SHA‑384 digest algorithm via Aspose.Pdf.

sign-pdf-with-sha512-aspdf.title: Sign PDF with SHA‑512 using Aspose.Pdf
sign-pdf-with-sha512-aspdf.description: Demonstrates adding a signature field to a PDF and signing it with an X509 certificate using the SHA‑512 digest algorithm via Aspose.Pdf.

sign-pdf-with-rsa-4096-certificate.title: Sign PDF with RSA 4096‑bit Certificate
sign-pdf-with-rsa-4096-certificate.description: Shows how to load a PDF, add a signature field, and apply a PKCS#7 signature using a 4096‑bit RSA certificate (PFX) with Aspose.Pdf.

sign-pdf-with-ecc-p256.title: Sign PDF with ECC P‑256 Private Key using Aspose.Pdf
sign-pdf-with-ecc-p256.description: Demonstrates how to create a signature field in a PDF and sign it with an ECC (P‑256) certificate from a PFX file using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

encrypt-pdf-with-smart-card-certificate.title: Encrypt PDF with Smart Card Certificate
encrypt-pdf-with-smart-card-certificate.description: Demonstrates how to locate a certificate on a smart card and use it to encrypt a PDF with AES‑256, restricting permissions via Aspose.Pdf.

decrypt-pdf-using-certificate-token.title: Decrypt PDF Using Certificate from Hardware Token
decrypt-pdf-using-certificate-token.description: Shows how to open a PDF encrypted with a public certificate and automatically retrieve the private key from a hardware token to decrypt and save the document.

batch-sign-pdfs-with-certificates.title: Batch Sign PDFs Using Document-Type Certificates
batch-sign-pdfs-with-certificates.description: Demonstrates iterating over a list of PDFs, fetching a certificate per document type from a data source, and applying a PKCS#7 signature to every signature field using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-encrypt-pdfs-with-date-based-passw.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with Date-Based Passwords
batch-encrypt-pdfs-with-date-based-passw.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt multiple PDF files in a folder using Aspose.Pdf, generating a unique password for each file from a SHA‑256 hash of the file name and the current date.

add-new-empty-signature-field.title: Add a New Empty Signature Field and List Existing Ones
add-new-empty-signature-field.description: The sample loads a PDF, lists any existing signature fields, creates a new empty signature field on the first page, adds it to the form, and saves the updated document.

validate-pdf-signature-extract-san.title: Validate PDF Signature and Extract Certificate SAN
validate-pdf-signature-extract-san.description: The example loads a PDF, checks for signature fields, validates each signature using Aspose.Pdf's validation API, extracts the signing certificate, and displays its Subject Alternative Name entries.

encrypt-pdf-with-user-owner-passwords-re.title: Encrypt PDF with User and Owner Passwords and Remove User Password
encrypt-pdf-with-user-owner-passwords-re.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF with both user and owner passwords using AES‑256, then reopening the file with the owner password to remove the user password while preserving encryption.

sign-pdf-and-flatten-form-fields.title: Sign PDF and Flatten Form Fields
sign-pdf-and-flatten-form-fields.description: Shows how to add a digital PKCS#7 signature to a PDF and then flatten all form fields to prevent further editing.

encrypt-pdf-log-access.title: Encrypt PDF and Log Access Attempts
encrypt-pdf-log-access.description: Creates a PDF, encrypts it with a password, then demonstrates logging of access attempts with wrong and correct passwords.
